LCD DISPLAY
===========

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: LCD icon map placeholder.
   :width: 420px

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1
   :widths: 12 28 60

   * - ID
     - Indicator
     - Description
   * - 1
     - Wi-Fi
     - On: connected. Blink: ready to connect. Off: disconnected.
   * - 2
     - Bluetooth
     - On: connected. Blink: ready to connect. Off: disconnected.
   * - 3
     - Quiet Charging Mode
     - Reduces charging noise and charging speed. App configurable. Setting is retained after power-off.
   * - 4
     - Battery Saving Mode
     - Limits usable battery capacity to extend life. App configurable. Setting is retained after power-off.
   * - 5
     - Charging Plan / Self-powered / TOU Mode
     - App-controlled smart charging strategies for electricity cost optimization.
   * - 6
     - UPS
     - On: bypass mode enabled, switchover time is 10 ms. Off: bypass mode disabled.
   * - 7
     - AC Power Indicator
     - AC output is enabled (pure sine wave output).
   * - 8
     - Output Voltage and Frequency
     - Displays AC output voltage and frequency.
   * - 9
     - Input Power
     - Displays input power in watts.
   * - 10
     - Remaining Charge Time
     - Displays remaining charging time.
   * - 11
     - AC Wall Charging Indicator
     - Charging via AC input from grid power.
   * - 12
     - Car Charging Indicator
     - Charging via DC input from vehicle source.
   * - 13
     - Solar Charging Indicator
     - Charging via DC input from solar panel(s).
   * - 14
     - Charging Power Limit
     - Indicates whether charging power limit is enabled in the App.
   * - 16
     - Battery Power Indicator
     - Ring animation while charging; ring stays on during discharge.
   * - 17
     - Low Battery Indicator
     - On: below 20%. Blink: below 5%. Off: normal or charging.
   * - 18
     - Remaining Battery Percentage
     - Displays remaining battery SOC percentage.
   * - 20
     - Fault Code
     - Indicates product fault. Refer to Troubleshooting.
   * - 21
     - Temperature Indicator
     - High/low temperature protection is active until temperature returns to normal range.
   * - 22
     - Energy Saving Mode
     - Indicates whether output auto-off protection mode is enabled.
   * - 23
     - Output Power
     - Displays output power in watts.
   * - 24
     - Remaining Discharge Time
     - Displays remaining discharging time.

.. note::

   Replace the LCD placeholder with the final UI icon diagram and keep numbering aligned with this table.
